text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You're definitely going to the Japan Cup,
right?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Duh! It's a direct showdown between Rudolf and
Brian! I wouldn't miss it!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: What?! We can't do any interviews this week?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid we're rather overwhelmed with
interview requests this week.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, we've had to take extra measures
to address people entering the campus without
permission, so it's getting more difficult to grant
permission for interviews.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, who do you think will win? It's gotta be
President Rudolf, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: It's hard to say... Why don't we watch and see?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
We'll bear witness to the moment when the title
of greatest ever changes hands!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Are people really that worked up about the
outcome?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We're both going to reach greater heights. Next
time we race... I won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then... until "the time comes," as you said.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...The time has come.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(The gates are definitely going to be full at the
race. There are going to be a lot of other racers
besides me.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (And she'll be among them.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(We'll all line up at the gates. Me. Her. And
then...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Gasp! Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...The same time again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian suddenly stops running in the middle
of training for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen was strong. So was Mihono
Bourbon. And Oguri Cap too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But Symboli Rudolf was even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was able to compete against racers of
incomparable skill in both the spring Tenno Sho
and the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's why I understand their strength.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And Rudolf, sitting on her throne as Emperor, was
especially outstanding.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't think the results of that race would change
even now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Every time I repeat that match in my head, the
picture becomes more clear.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The wall that surrounds the Emperor is massive
and imposing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It might be reckless to go beyond it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's legs tremble slightly as she says
that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What if I told you that's not it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What if the truth is that... I'm actually scared?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen her like this before. Narita Brian is
nervous.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list: If anyone can do it, it's you!
If anyone can do it, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What if I lose?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hah. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (Come to think of it, this all started when...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is racing. The first across the finish line wins,
right?
choice_data_list:
You're going to win, no matter who you're up
against!

You're going to win, no matter who you're up
against!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Don't try and make me say that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha... Idiot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ever since that time, you—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...It's nothing. You probably don't even
remember.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You big dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, there's a press conference in the
lead up to the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf is the first to arrive. As for Narita
Brian...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Hey, is Brian not coming?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me she decided to withdraw. There's no
way...

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
No, it's definitely possible. She lost that
scrimmage against Rudolf, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thump!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...You're late.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I forgot something.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I forgot to tell you directly that I'm going to beat
you this time.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: E-Excuse me... Brian, did you just say that—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I will overcome the Emperor in the Japan Cup
without a doubt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's a bold claim! She's not even
considering the possibility of losing?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
This is headline material! Hurry up and get
working on a special feature!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...There is no going back now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I never had any intention of turning back.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and Symboli Rudolf line up beside
each other and hold out their hands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's only a short while left before their
showdown.
